economic_notes: Cree Nation has 25.5% interest in Pesakastew Solar Limited Partnership developing a 10 MW solar farm with SaskPower agreement. Has 8.3% interest in FHQ Casino Holdings Ltd. COVID-19 impacted gaming revenues; loan payments deferred. Subsequent to year-end, Pesakastew Solar LP obtained up to $17M in debt financing at 4.13% for 20 years to construct solar farm.
notes: Fiscal year 2021, not 2024. Consolidated entity includes Star Blanket Cree Nation, CMHC Housing Program, White Buffalo Calf Gaming Authority, Star Blanket Rentals, Red Dog Holdings Ltd., and Red Dog Holdings Limited Partnership. Star Blanket Treaty Land Entitlement Trust is excluded as not controlled. Nation is under a Management Action Plan with ISC due to operating fund deficiencies. COVID-19 resulted in deferred loan payments. Large ISC funding variance between budget ($3.98M) and actual ($6.63M) due to capital project deferred revenue recognition. Net debt position of $2.39M. CMHC total_government_transfers includes ISC $6,625,669 plus CMHC $120,542 = $6,746,211. osr calculated as total revenue $8,345,113 minus total government transfers $6,746,211 = $1,598,902. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text.
